title: Combining Taskname and Description into one colum

posts.author: GaryGalmin (Gary Galmin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there

I am new to monday and had a request to see if I can link the Task Name and Description field together.

So for the Taskname, its like a one liner description and the description field would be comments and or details supporting the one liner.

I have a form I am using to capture intake also.

Thank you in advance for any help or direction I can look into.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gary,

At this stage, this isn’t currently possible in terms of automatically combining the two together. That said, have you considered setting up a text column or long text as the description section instead?
